Anon can read active staff emails.name: Anon can read active staff emails

Authenticated users can insert audit log.name: Authenticated users can insert audit logs

Authenticated users can read audit logs.name: Authenticated users can read audit logs

Public can view active team members.name: Public can view active team members

Admins can insert invitations.name: Admins can insert invitations
Admins can insert invitations.withCheck:
(invited_by IN ( SELECT app_users.id
   FROM app_users
  WHERE ((app_users.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (app_users.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'oracle'::text])))))

Authenticated users can read CRM lookups.name: Authenticated users can read CRM lookups

Authenticated users can read CRM stages.name: Authenticated users can read CRM stages

Authenticated users can delete invoice i.name: Authenticated users can delete invoice items

Authenticated users can insert invoice i.name: Authenticated users can insert invoice items

Authenticated users can read invoice ite.name: Authenticated users can read invoice items

Authenticated users can update invoice i.name: Authenticated users can update invoice items

Authenticated users can read CRM package.name: Authenticated users can read CRM packages

Anon read sent proposal items.name: Anon read sent proposal items
Anon read sent proposal items.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM crm_proposals
  WHERE ((crm_proposals.id = crm_proposal_items.proposal_id) AND (crm_proposals.status = 'sent'::text))))

scheduling_bookings_facilitator_slot_uni.name: scheduling_bookings_facilitator_slot_unique
scheduling_bookings_facilitator_slot_uni.where: ((cancelled_at IS NULL) AND (facilitator_id IS NOT NULL))

scheduling_bookings_staff_slot_unique.name: scheduling_bookings_staff_slot_unique
scheduling_bookings_staff_slot_unique.where: ((cancelled_at IS NULL) AND (staff_user_id IS NOT NULL))

scheduling_bookings_assignee_chk.name: scheduling_bookings_assignee_chk
scheduling_bookings_assignee_chk.value: (cancelled_at IS NOT NULL) OR (profile_id IS NOT NULL) OR (staff_user_id IS NOT NULL) OR (facilitator_id IS NOT NULL)

meeting_description.name: meeting_description
meeting_description.default: 'Free phone consultation to discuss your goals and treatment options.'

event_types_admin_all.name: event_types_admin_all
event_types_admin_all.using:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (app_users u
     JOIN user_permissions up ON ((up.app_user_id = u.id)))
  WHERE ((u.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (up.permission_key = 'manage_scheduling'::text) AND (up.granted = true)))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM app_users u
  WHERE ((u.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (u.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'oracle'::text]))))))

staff insert integration notes.name: staff insert integration notes
staff insert integration notes.withCheck:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM app_users
  WHERE ((app_users.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (app_users.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'staff'::text, 'oracle'::text])))))

within_retreat_agreements_admin_all.name: within_retreat_agreements_admin_all
within_retreat_agreements_admin_all.withCheck:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM app_users au
  WHERE ((au.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (au.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'staff'::text, 'oracle'::text])))))
within_retreat_agreements_admin_all.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM app_users au
  WHERE ((au.auth_user_id = auth.uid()) AND (au.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'staff'::text, 'oracle'::text])))))
